[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010 1
1 0010010 2
2 1011001 4
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0010101 3
7 1101010 4

01 0010101 3 match 6
12 1101110 5
